summary: A compact single-story rectangular building with a flat roof featuring a dark burgundy/maroon top layer. The structure has wood plank walls with three evenly-spaced window openings on the visible front face. A stone brick foundation and platform surround the base. The building sits on a dirt foundation with a stone brick perimeter.
elements: flat roof with dark burgundy cap
rebuild_hints: Create stone brick foundation and platform base layer
Construct wood plank walls 4 blocks high
Place three evenly-spaced window openings (approximately 2×2 blocks each) on front face
Add stone brick frame around each window opening
Top with flat roof using stone brick
Add dark burgundy/nether brick layer on top of roof
Ensure symmetrical window placement with equal spacing
Add stone brick perimeter border around the entire base
uncertainties: Exact window dimensions and spacing not precisely measurable from angles provided
Interior layout and floor details not visible
Exact block count for depth and width estimated from perspective
Roof composition layers uncertain - appears to be stone brick with nether brick cap but could be alternative dark blocks
Whether building has interior rooms or is hollow structure unclear
